examples: He began counting them and then, with growing perplexity, counted them a second time.
The little King observed his perplexity, and dissipated it with a word.
Most of them just stared at her in perplexity.
The professor foresees some perplexity on the French side as this new truth sinks in.
His black-ringed eyes and black-lined eyebrows registered sadness, wonder, perplexity and terror.
